visual_description: A hand is seen gripping a car door handle in a dimly lit interior. A computer screen displays a messaging interface with text in Chinese and English, including “SEND MESSAGE ALL GSM900” and “2way communication.” The scene is dark, with only the screen and hand illuminated.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a low pitch with a moderate pace, accompanied by a sigh and a gasp.
